--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,

Bell 430 update:
The 2002 Bell 430 with 543 hours that we located on
the internet â€œ
Controller.comâ€ was sold 2 months ago. Selling
Price: 6.150M. executive interior
included.

Wayne Heisinghaâ€™s Bell 430 is a 2002 with 350
hours, Bell is taking on trade.
There asking price is 6.2M. We have first right to
buy helicopter, they will
offer publicly late next week. Paul told me that
100K deposit will hold the
helicopter while we negotiate price since there is
extensive interior mods that
we will require, see attachment. Delivery of
Wayneâ€™s new Bell 430 is
expected to be ready Nov. He will not release the
2002 Bell 430 until his new
helicopter is delivered.

Larry,
Please do not faint when you open this! We need to
discuss this so I can
give you the detail of what we have outlined and so
we can discuss what you may
and may not want installed in this aircraft. In the
mean time I have
researched this a little further and when this
helicopter went through its initial
completion we did install the maximum amount of
QuietZone soundproofing that the
Bell plastics could accommodate.
I am embarrassed to tell you that we do not have
interior photos. I will
get interior and exterior photos for you ASAP.
Call me when you have a chance.(please see
attachments from edwards
for pricing
Thanks, Paul
